query: SELECT * FROM platform_runners WHERE TRUE AND ($1::int8[] IS NULL OR array_position($1, id) IS NOT NULL) AND ($2::timestamptz[] IS NULL OR array_position($2, created_at) IS NOT NULL) AND ($3::int8[] IS NULL OR array_position($3, platform_id) IS NOT NULL) AND ($4::int8[] IS NULL OR array_position($4, file_id) IS NOT NULL)
